/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/bench_kv.dir/bench/bench_kv.cc.o CMakeFiles/bench_kv.dir/src/kv_db.cc.o CMakeFiles/bench_kv.dir/src/memtable.cc.o CMakeFiles/bench_kv.dir/src/write_batch.cc.o CMakeFiles/bench_kv.dir/src/wal.cc.o CMakeFiles/bench_kv.dir/src/sstable.cc.o CMakeFiles/bench_kv.dir/src/version_set.cc.o CMakeFiles/bench_kv.dir/src/merging_iterator.cc.o CMakeFiles/bench_kv.dir/src/lru_cache.cc.o CMakeFiles/bench_kv.dir/src/bloom_filter.cc.o -o bench_kv
